subcodes.first_line: O Hadi! Hearken unto the Call of God from the Divine Lote-Tree of Glory: verily, there is no God but Me, the All-Subduing, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا هادی ان استمع ندآء الله من سدره البهاء انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort
